title: +2 High School Udhwa Launches Official Website for Online Admissions
excerpt: +2 High School Udhwa has launched its official website highschooludhwa.in, where students will be able to register and apply for admissions online.

title: IMD Issues Heatwave Alerts as Temperatures Rise Across Several Indian States
excerpt: The India Meteorological Department has issued heatwave alerts for multiple states as temperatures cross 44°C in some regions.

title: AI Tools See Rapid Growth Among Students and Professionals in 2026
excerpt: Artificial Intelligence tools are seeing major growth in 2026 as students and professionals increasingly use them for learning and productivity.
